name: RadioGroup
summary: Single-choice group of `Radio` options with keyboard roving focus; controlled via `value` + `onValueChange` or bound to a `FormControl` by `name`, with `gap` for option spacing. Disable the whole group with `disabled` (a FormControl's form-wide `disabled` / name-keyed `errors` also reach it); option colours follow the theme intent contract (consistent with Checkbox).

examples.title: Inline single-choice group
FormControl binding
